languages.text: "Именем Помазанника Императора Себериана фон Валанциуса, я, сенешаль династии Лария Войгтвир, приговариваю тебя, предатель, к смертной казни". {n}Сенешаль выговаривает каждое слово глухо, механически двигая челюстью.{/n} "По воле Бога-Императора да свершится правосудие". {n}Реальность тонет во вспышках выстрелов, разрывающих вашу плоть, и последнее, что вы видите перед наступлением темноты — исполненный злобы и отчаяния взгляд Ларии.{/n}

"In the name of the Emperor's anointed Seberian von Valancius, I, Seneschal of the Dynasty Laria Voigtvir, sentence you, traitor, to death." {n}The Seneschal delivers each word in a hollow tone, her jaw working stiffly.{/n} "By the will of the God-Emperor, let justice be done." {n}The world is plunged into a sea of gunfire that tears through your flesh, and the last thing you see before darkness falls is Laria's angry, desperate gaze.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Именем Помазанника Императора Себериана фон Валанциуса, я, сенешаль династии Лария Войгтвир, приговариваю тебя, предатель, к смертной казни". {n}Сенешаль выговаривает каждое слово глухо, механически двигая челюстью.{/n} "По воле Бога-Императора да свершится правосудие". {n}Реальность тонет во вспышках выстрелов, разрывающих вашу плоть, и последнее, что вы видите перед наступлением темноты — исполненный злобы и отчаяния взгляд Ларии.{/n}

"In the name of the Emperor's anointed Seberian von Valancius, I, Seneschal of the Dynasty Laria Voigtvir, sentence you, traitor, to death." {n}The Seneschal delivers each word in a hollow tone, her jaw working stiffly.{/n} "By the will of the God-Emperor, let justice be done." {n}The world is plunged into a sea of gunfire that tears through your flesh, and the last thing you see before darkness falls is Laria's angry, desperate gaze.{/n}

"In the name of the Emperor's anointed Seberian von Valancius, I, Seneschal of the Dynasty Laria Voigtvir, sentence you, traitor, to death." {n}The Seneschal delivers each word in a hollow tone, her jaw working stiffly.{/n} "By the will of the God-Emperor, let justice be done." {n}The world is plunged into a sea of gunfire that tears through your flesh, and the last thing you see before darkness falls is Laria's angry, desperate gaze.{/n}

languages.text: «En nombre del ungido del Emperador Seberian von Valancius, yo, la Senescal de la dinastía Laria Voigtvir, te condeno a muerte, traidor{mf||a}». {n}La Senescal pronuncia cada palabra con un tono sordo y la barbilla rígida.{/n} «Por voluntad del Dios Emperador, que se haga justicia». {n}El mundo se sume en un mar de balas que atraviesan tu carne. Lo último que ves antes de que te devore la oscuridad es la mirada furiosa y desesperada de Laria.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In the name of the Emperor's anointed Seberian von Valancius, I, Seneschal of the Dynasty Laria Voigtvir, sentence you, traitor, to death." {n}The Seneschal delivers each word in a hollow tone, her jaw working stiffly.{/n} "By the will of the God-Emperor, let justice be done." {n}The world is plunged into a sea of gunfire that tears through your flesh, and the last thing you see before darkness falls is Laria's angry, desperate gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «En nombre del ungido del Emperador Seberian von Valancius, yo, la Senescal de la dinastía Laria Voigtvir, te condeno a muerte, traidor{mf||a}». {n}La Senescal pronuncia cada palabra con un tono sordo y la barbilla rígida.{/n} «Por voluntad del Dios Emperador, que se haga justicia». {n}El mundo se sume en un mar de balas que atraviesan tu carne. Lo último que ves antes de que te devore la oscuridad es la mirada furiosa y desesperada de Laria.{/n}

languages.text: “以帝皇神选者塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯之名，我，王朝总领菈丽雅·维特威尔，在此宣判你死刑，叛徒。”{n}总领的声音空洞而僵硬，每一个字都像是从紧咬的牙关中挤出来的。{/n}“奉神皇之旨，正义得申。”{n}枪火瞬间淹没一切，子弹撕裂你的血肉，在意识坠入黑暗之前，你看到的最后一幕，是菈丽雅愤怒而绝望的目光。{/n}
languages.original_text: "In the name of the Emperor's anointed Seberian von Valancius, I, Seneschal of the Dynasty Laria Voigtvir, sentence you, traitor, to death." {n}The Seneschal delivers each word in a hollow tone, her jaw working stiffly.{/n} "By the will of the God-Emperor, let justice be done." {n}The world is plunged into a sea of gunfire that tears through your flesh, and the last thing you see before darkness falls is Laria's angry, desperate gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “以帝皇神选者塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯之名，我，王朝总领菈丽雅·维特威尔，在此宣判你死刑，叛徒。”{n}总领的声音空洞而僵硬，每一个字都像是从紧咬的牙关中挤出来的。{/n}“奉神皇之旨，正义得申。”{n}枪火瞬间淹没一切，子弹撕裂你的血肉，在意识坠入黑暗之前，你看到的最后一幕，是菈丽雅愤怒而绝望的目光。{/n}

languages.text: « En vertu des pouvoirs qui me sont conférés par l'élu de l'Empereur Seberian von Valancius, moi, la sénéchale de la dynastie Laria Voigtvir, je vous condamne à mort pour trahison. » {n}Mâchoires crispées, votre vis-à-vis débite chaque mot d'une voix atone.{/n} « Par la volonté de l'Empereur-Dieu, que justice soit rendue. » {n}Le monde autour de vous plonge aussitôt dans un océan de coups de feu qui vous transpercent de part en part, et la dernière chose que vous voyez avant que les ténèbres vous engloutissent n'est autre que le regard furieux et désespéré de Laria.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In the name of the Emperor's anointed Seberian von Valancius, I, Seneschal of the Dynasty Laria Voigtvir, sentence you, traitor, to death." {n}The Seneschal delivers each word in a hollow tone, her jaw working stiffly.{/n} "By the will of the God-Emperor, let justice be done." {n}The world is plunged into a sea of gunfire that tears through your flesh, and the last thing you see before darkness falls is Laria's angry, desperate gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « En vertu des pouvoirs qui me sont conférés par l'élu de l'Empereur Seberian von Valancius, moi, la sénéchale de la dynastie Laria Voigtvir, je vous condamne à mort pour trahison. » {n}Mâchoires crispées, votre vis-à-vis débite chaque mot d'une voix atone.{/n} « Par la volonté de l'Empereur-Dieu, que justice soit rendue. » {n}Le monde autour de vous plonge aussitôt dans un océan de coups de feu qui vous transpercent de part en part, et la dernière chose que vous voyez avant que les ténèbres vous engloutissent n'est autre que le regard furieux et désespéré de Laria.{/n}

languages.text: "İmparator'un seçilmişi Seberian von Valancius adına ben, Hanedanlık Seneşali Laria Voigtvir, seni vatan hainliğinden ölüme mahkûm ediyorum." {n}Çenesi kaskatı kesilen Seneşal, her kelimeyi boğuk bir tonda söylüyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator'un iradesiyle adalet yerini bulsun." {n}Dünya, bedenini parçalayan bir silah ateşi denizine gömülüyor. Karanlık çökmeden önce gördüğün son şeyse Laria'nın öfkeli, çaresiz bakışları oluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In the name of the Emperor's anointed Seberian von Valancius, I, Seneschal of the Dynasty Laria Voigtvir, sentence you, traitor, to death." {n}The Seneschal delivers each word in a hollow tone, her jaw working stiffly.{/n} "By the will of the God-Emperor, let justice be done." {n}The world is plunged into a sea of gunfire that tears through your flesh, and the last thing you see before darkness falls is Laria's angry, desperate gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "İmparator'un seçilmişi Seberian von Valancius adına ben, Hanedanlık Seneşali Laria Voigtvir, seni vatan hainliğinden ölüme mahkûm ediyorum." {n}Çenesi kaskatı kesilen Seneşal, her kelimeyi boğuk bir tonda söylüyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator'un iradesiyle adalet yerini bulsun." {n}Dünya, bedenini parçalayan bir silah ateşi denizine gömülüyor. Karanlık çökmeden önce gördüğün son şeyse Laria'nın öfkeli, çaresiz bakışları oluyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Im Namen des vom Imperator gesalbten Seberian von Valancius verurteile ich, Laria Voigtvir, Euch gemäß meines Amtes als Truchsess der Dynastie zum Tode, Verräterin!" {n}Der Truchsess verkündet jedes Wort mit gleichgültiger Stimme.{/n} "Im Namen des Gottimperators, möge der Gerechtigkeit genüge getan werden." {n}Die Welt versinkt in einem Hagel aus Schüssen, die dein Fleisch zerfetzen. Das Letzte, was du siehst, ehe dich die Dunkelheit umhüllt, ist Larias gleichsam wütendes wie verzweifeltes Gesicht.{/n}
languages.original_text: "In the name of the Emperor's anointed Seberian von Valancius, I, Seneschal of the Dynasty Laria Voigtvir, sentence you, traitor, to death." {n}The Seneschal delivers each word in a hollow tone, her jaw working stiffly.{/n} "By the will of the God-Emperor, let justice be done." {n}The world is plunged into a sea of gunfire that tears through your flesh, and the last thing you see before darkness falls is Laria's angry, desperate gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Im Namen des vom Imperator gesalbten Seberian von Valancius verurteile ich, Laria Voigtvir, Euch gemäß meines Amtes als Truchsess der Dynastie zum Tode, Verräterin!" {n}Der Truchsess verkündet jedes Wort mit gleichgültiger Stimme.{/n} "Im Namen des Gottimperators, möge der Gerechtigkeit genüge getan werden." {n}Die Welt versinkt in einem Hagel aus Schüssen, die dein Fleisch zerfetzen. Das Letzte, was du siehst, ehe dich die Dunkelheit umhüllt, ist Larias gleichsam wütendes wie verzweifeltes Gesicht.{/n}

languages.text: 「皇帝の御命を受けたシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスの名において、私は、王朝ラリア・ヴォイストヴィル家の執事、汝を裏切り者として死刑に処する」{n}執事は空虚な声で、顎を硬く動かして言葉を紡ぐ。{/n}「神皇帝の御意志により、正義が執行される」{n}世界は銃撃の海に飲み込まれ、肉体を貫く銃弾の雨の中、最後の視界に映るのはラリアの怒りと絶望に満ちた眼差しだった。{/n}
languages.original_text: "In the name of the Emperor's anointed Seberian von Valancius, I, Seneschal of the Dynasty Laria Voigtvir, sentence you, traitor, to death." {n}The Seneschal delivers each word in a hollow tone, her jaw working stiffly.{/n} "By the will of the God-Emperor, let justice be done." {n}The world is plunged into a sea of gunfire that tears through your flesh, and the last thing you see before darkness falls is Laria's angry, desperate gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「皇帝の御命を受けたシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスの名において、私は、王朝ラリア・ヴォイストヴィル家の執事、汝を裏切り者として死刑に処する」{n}執事は空虚な声で、顎を硬く動かして言葉を紡ぐ。{/n}「神皇帝の御意志により、正義が執行される」{n}世界は銃撃の海に飲み込まれ、肉体を貫く銃弾の雨の中、最後の視界に映るのはラリアの怒りと絶望に満ちた眼差しだった。{/n}
